title: Telecom Outage Forecast Desk
summary: Forecast outage risk and service degradation windows so network teams can pre-position crews and protect SLA performance.
knowledge_base: User: telecom NOC and field service teams.
Primary pain: outage forecasts rarely map cleanly to crew staging and SLA decisions.
Decision output: regional risk alerts, crew staging, and preemptive interventions.
Business impact: fewer SLA breaches and faster outage response.

app_modules.label: Telecom 01
app_modules.title: Outage Risk Intake
app_modules.description: Score the next service-risk window for a target region.

app_modules.label: Telecom 02
app_modules.title: SLA Delta Review
app_modules.description: Compare the current risk forecast against the last stable service baseline.

app_modules.label: Telecom 03
app_modules.title: Crew Deployment Note
app_modules.description: Generate the pre-storm deployment note for field operations leaders.
